notes: Offline-friendly index of the American Gut Project primary accessions and entry points. This is not sequencing data and contains no participant-level metadata.

records.description: American Gut Project sequences and metadata hosted at ENA/EBI under PRJEB11419.
American Gut Project study in Qiita (study ID 10317). Access typically requires Qiita tooling (e.g., redbiom) or Qiita public downloads when available.

provenance.limitations: Qiita public downloads may require login and files can be very large; this snapshot intentionally bundles only identifiers + access points.
